name: Lee Partial Heating Reference — Uniform Mid-Flow Smoke Case
description: Forced-convection plate-fin heatsink case derived from Lee et al. (2019), using the uniformly heated, 7 mm channel-width configuration at 0.4 m^3/min.

provenance.citation: Lee, J. J., Kim, H. J., and Kim, D.-K. (2019). Experimental Study on Forced Convection Heat Transfer from Plate-Fin Heat Sinks with Partial Heating. Processes, 7(10), 772.
provenance.notes: This case is included as a cited smoke/trend reference rather than a strict benchmark. The current pytest harness compares only the global analyze_plate_fin_heatsink output, while the paper's most valuable comparisons involve max base temperature under partial heating and source-position effects.

notes: Derived from Table 1 for the 7 mm channel-width, uniformly heated configuration at 0.4 m^3/min. The source is set to the full base because the benchmark harness cannot yet express the paper's off-center heating-position comparisons.
